step_rationale: Neutrophil-activation marker; reflects NET formation and microparticle release during acute thrombotic event.
mechanism: CD66b-positive neutrophil microparticles and extracellular traps amplify platelet activation and thrombus propagation in STEMI.

references.title: Localization of Hemostasis Elements in Aspirated Coronary Thrombi at Different Stages of Evolution.
Circulating microparticle signature in coronary and peripheral blood of ST elevation myocardial infarction patients in relation to pain-to-PCI elapsed time.
